mainEntity.name: Can independent contractors in North Salt Lake get workers comp?
mainEntity.text: Can independent contractors in North Salt Lake get workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, unless misclassified; true ICs excluded but can buy own coverage[3].

suggestedAnswer.text: North Salt Lake: Prove employee status via control test. Gig workers often denied—file misclassification claim. Davis County firms handle[3][4].

name: Independent Contractor Claims North Salt Lake
description: No, unless misclassified; true ICs excluded but can buy own coverage[3].
